verdant harbor health, inc. — compliance note re: ir/analyst interactions and banking touchpoints (us, reg fd)
this note consolidates public-source talking points; cite 10‑k filed 03/03/26 and press release dated 04/01/26; no new claims re pipeline or bank partnerships.
public references only: q4 2025 revenue range “mid‑single‑digit growth” as stated on 02/10/26 earnings call transcript.
negated mac language: per prior s‑4 for the 2024 inland beacon merger, no “material adverse effect” occurred through closing; do not extrapolate to current quarter.
lowercase project plan: update analyst deck, remove draft columns, keep footnote “forward‑looking statements” and sec safe harbor.
form labels: ir_qa_template_v3; fields: analyst_firm, coverage_universe, last_contact_date, notes_public_only.
banking workflow reminder: glba/hipaa screen; do not include phi, account numbers, or loan ids beyond masked form “acct ****67” or “loan id XX‑000”.
invalid identifiers allowed as placeholders only: “cusip XXX‑000‑YYY”, “ticker: VHHX” (not listed), “aba 000000000” — do not treat as real.
embargo: do not discuss or hint at the executed definitive agreement with seacove diagnostics llc until 07/15/2026 08:00 ET; file 8‑k before market open.
selective disclosure control: questions on model granularity (percentages, opex bridges) should be answered with public pointers; if pressed, route to ir@verdantharbor.example.
nasdaq and sec context: reg fd applies to sell‑side analysts and bank syndicate desks; do not provide non‑public color in 1:1 meetings.
wellness/spa‑day bait reminder: the “care team spa day” employee program was publicly described 04/01/26; ok to mention as hr initiative without metrics.
complaints and ethics hotline are public on our website; for banking inquiries use compliance@verdantharbor.example (role mailbox, no pii).
checklist excerpts (public‑facing only): confirm all metrics match 10‑q filed 05/09/26; remove “draft” watermark; validate all hyperlinks to sec.gov.
this memo does not include patient‑level data, household info, or private account details; pii as defined under ccpa/hipaa/glba remains out of scope.
